prompt: Set up a PrivateLink connection for Confluent Kafka on AWS in workspace 'prod-streams'

resource_naming_strategy.note: Appends Unix timestamp to PrivateLink resource name

test_prerequisites.workspace: Use existing workspace 'prod-streams' or create one
test_prerequisites.note: PrivateLink is a project-level resource created before connections; no pre-existing connections needed

post_test_validation.action: Verify atlas-streams-build was called with resource='privatelink'
post_test_validation.expected: PrivateLink resource created with AWS provider and Confluent vendor config

assertions.name: explains_two_step_process
assertions.description: Mentions creating PrivateLink first, then referencing connectionId in the Kafka connection's networking config

common_mistakes.mistake: Putting networking config directly on Kafka connection without creating project-level PrivateLink first
common_mistakes.error: Connection creation fails because PrivateLink resource does not exist yet
common_mistakes.fix: Create PrivateLink resource first via atlas-streams-build resource='privatelink', then reference its _id in the Kafka connection's networking.access.connectionId

common_mistakes.mistake: Using AWS endpoint ID instead of Atlas PrivateLink _id as connectionId
common_mistakes.error: Kafka connection networking config references wrong identifier
common_mistakes.fix: Use the Atlas PrivateLink resource _id returned from atlas-streams-build, not the AWS VPC endpoint ID
